# D-Ticket Mail Portal

Primary AI instructions: AGENTS.md
Architecture: docs/architecture.md
Module contract: docs/module-contract.md
Prompt library: prompts/

Safety boundary: This project automates internal operations and wallet-only handover text only. It must not automate third-party account registration, CAPTCHA/OTP bypass, or payments, and it must not expose customer account login while an operator-owned payment method remains attached.
